prestazioni: Replace the original 1.1L Coventry Climax FWA engine (engine code: FWA) with a fully built 1.5L Coventry Climax FWB (engine code: FWB) stroked to 1.6L using a forged crankshaft from Cosworth, billet connecting rods from Arrow Precision, and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression ratio for methanol fuel compatibility). Pair with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold from Jenvey Dynamics featuring individual throttle bodies (ITBs) and a custom fuel rail for methanol injection, fed by a Bosch Motorsport high-pressure fuel pump (044 series).

Install a custom-built 4-into-1 equal-length stainless steel exhaust header from Janspeed Engineering, paired with a straight-pipe exhaust system using a 2.25-inch diameter titanium piping from Burns Stainless, terminating in a 4-inch megaphone-style muffler from SuperTrapp for optimal scavenging and weight reduction. The header is ceramic-coated by Swain Tech for thermal efficiency.

Upgrade the original 4-speed manual transmission to a close-ratio 5-speed dog-box from Hewland (LD200 model) with a limited-slip differential from Quaife (ATB type), paired with a lightweight flywheel from Tilton Engineering and a twin-plate ceramic clutch from Sachs Racing. The drivetrain is reinforced with a custom aluminum bellhousing from Taylor Race Engineering and a driveshaft from GKN Driveline, balanced for high-RPM stability.
estetica: Replace the original aluminum body panels with ultra-lightweight carbon fiber replicas from Fibre-Lyte Components, including a single-piece front clamshell, rear decklid, and doors (if applicable), all finished in a matte clear coat with exposed carbon weave. The bodywork is further reinforced with a custom aluminum subframe from Lotus Heritage for rigidity.

Install a period-correct Le Mans-style hardtop from Williams & Pritchard, modified with a lightweight polycarbonate rear window from Lexan and a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (FIA-approved, 6-point design with integrated door bars). The hardtop is painted in British Racing Green with gold pinstriping by RS Coachworks, matching the original Lotus Eleven livery.

Upgrade the wheels to a set of 15-inch magnesium alloy knock-off wheels from Borrani (model: 500M), wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (4.50/15 front, 5.50/15 rear) for vintage racing authenticity. The wheels are paired with custom aluminum wheel spacers from HRE Performance and titanium wheel nuts from Bimecc. The brake system is upgraded to a set of 4-piston aluminum calipers from AP Racing (CP2622 model) with 11-inch vented rotors from Wilwood, using braided stainless steel brake lines from Goodridge.
